headline: Couple's 'Shared Calendar' Has Become A Weapon, They Keep Scheduling Over Each Other
summary: 'I see you scheduled a dentist appointment during my family dinner,' one note read. 'We need to talk.'
fullBody: Megan and Jake CalendarWar have been using their shared Google Calendar as a weapon. 'She scheduled a dentist appointment during my family dinner,' Jake said. 'He booked a haircut on our anniversary,' Megan countered. They've started leaving passive-aggressive notes in the calendar descriptions. 'I hope your root canal goes well,' one read. Their therapist has asked to see the calendar. They're 'considering it.'
